title: Modernity
description: Backport of modern vanilla and modded textures to legacy versions
body:
# Announcement.

This pack will now focus on supporting vanilla textures, to keep the file size down.
Support for mod textures has been split off into [Modernity Adjunct](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/modernity-adjunct).

From now on, I won't be adding wholesale support for additional mods. If you suggest a mod, unless I have a vested interest in that specific mod, I will only check to see if its nether ore blocks need updating.

If you want inclusion of more textures, please gather/create the updated textures to me either here in a DM, or on my [Discord server](https://discord.gg/ysKmmqe). Please tell me which Minecraft version the textures are for.

---

### Download additional Climate-mapped water color packs:

### [Format 1 (JE 1.6–1.8)](https://www.dropbox.com/sh/rrnzkp69qun64vt/AAAhFJKjMaRblDecV2EYoGI3a?dl=0)  |  [Format 2 (JE 1.9–1.10)](https://www.dropbox.com/sh/gc86tjd5epz1r4v/AABZzIGv-5HtTpMcbnndo6gta?dl=0)  |  [Format 3 (JE 1.11–1.12)](https://www.dropbox.com/sh/ll61m1y2q9o969e/AAAroAe0yDtwsSvnLLjjCDeHa?dl=0)

Remember to put your chosen mapping as priority above Modernity.

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/rx58ZUPu/images/c42e2ab95059222bd35008a1c51fbf90db41c9c1.png)

#### _Modernity_ also updates/adapts/backports textures for many mods, either to adapt their Nether ores to the modern style, or to backport post-1.12 mod textures. I'm not going to list all of the mods here because there are so many. Just download the pack and see if it works for your modset.
